languages.text: "Я желаю спуститься туда и услышать этих людей".

traits.locale_text: "Я желаю спуститься туда и услышать этих людей".

languages.text: "I wish to go down there and hear what these people have to say."
languages.original_text: "Я желаю спуститься туда и услышать этих людей".

traits.locale_text: "I wish to go down there and hear what these people have to say."
"I wish to go down there and hear what these people have to say."
"I wish to go down there and hear what these people have to say."

languages.text: 「私は、その下に行って、この人たちの話に耳を傾けたい」
languages.original_text: "I wish to go down there and hear what these people have to say."

languages.text: "Oraya inip bu insanların diyeceklerini duymak istiyorum."
languages.original_text: "I wish to go down there and hear what these people have to say."

traits.locale_text: "Oraya inip bu insanların diyeceklerini duymak istiyorum."

languages.text: “我要亲自前往，听听他们的说法。”
languages.original_text: "I wish to go down there and hear what these people have to say."

traits.locale_text: “我要亲自前往，听听他们的说法。”

languages.text: "Ich will mir dort unten anhören, was diese Leute zu sagen haben."
languages.original_text: "I wish to go down there and hear what these people have to say."

traits.locale_text: "Ich will mir dort unten anhören, was diese Leute zu sagen haben."

languages.text: « Je vais me rendre sur place afin d'entendre ce qu'ils ont à dire. »
languages.original_text: "I wish to go down there and hear what these people have to say."

traits.locale_text: « Je vais me rendre sur place afin d'entendre ce qu'ils ont à dire. »

languages.text: «Quiero bajar y escuchar lo que esta gente tiene que decir».
languages.original_text: "I wish to go down there and hear what these people have to say."

traits.locale_text: «Quiero bajar y escuchar lo que esta gente tiene que decir».
